extract: Swords Dance (Japanese: つるぎのまい Swords Dance) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM03 in Generation I. TM75 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR00 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM088 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM030 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
